description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named generate bundles that triggers on push events. The workflow has two jobs: build-win and publish_packages. The build-win job runs on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for x64 architecture and AI readiness. It checks out the repository, sets environment variables for the current date and commit hash, and has several commented-out steps for setting up VC++, Python, and compiling InVesalius. The publish_packages job runs on windows-latest, depends on build-win, and has a single step to print a message.
